record.text:
Key patterns:
• Effect concentrated in top exposure quartile
• Gradual — only significant by Year 3
• Strongest for jobs requiring <6 months experience
• No effect for experienced positions (>2 years)

New working paper 📄

Is generative AI reshaping who gets hired?

Using near-universe vacancy data from Flanders (Belgium), I find that the most AI-exposed occupations post 17% fewer entry-level vacancies three years after ChatGPT's launch; roughly 1,000 fewer starter jobs per quarter.
